corrections.note: Printed text reads singular κρίσις, not plural κρίσεις.
The page reads περικαλύπτος with acute on υ, not περισκαλυπτος? transcript has wrong accent placement.
Final nu is present in the printed text.
Transcript omits the phrase καὶ τὰς θύρας ὑφάπτειν from the body line.
Printed text has participle διελθών, not finite verb διῆλθεν.

corrections.current: om και τας θυρας υφαπτειν V
corrections.correct: om και τας θυρας υφαπτειν V
corrections.note: The lemma in the body confirms υφαπτειν; apparatus line itself is otherwise correctly transcribed.
Apparatus reads διελθων A, not διελθοντων A.

corrections.current: δεσποζοντα] ras 1 lit (fort σ inter ο et ς A?
corrections.correct: δεσποζοντα] ras 1 lit (fort σ inter ο et ς A?)
corrections.note: Closing parenthesis is present after A? in the printed apparatus.

notes: Running head and marginal line numbers match. Body has several substantive errors, including omission of a phrase in v. 41. Apparatus mostly matches, with a few transcription slips.
